title: Consistent Helmets
description: Helmet items are consistent with their model.
body:
For all of Minecraft's history, the Helmet item has been missing its nosepiece, making it inconsistent with its model when equipped. This pack changes the item texture of Iron, Gold, and Diamond Helmets to be **consistent** with the model and with the helmet model, similar to how the Netherite Helmet item is. This pack is compatible with my [**Oxidizing Copper Equipment**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oxidizing-copper-equipment) resource pack, which makes Copper Gear and Armor **oxidize** as they are used! To use both, make sure to have this pack selected ABOVE the Oxidizing Copper Equipment pack. ## ### MintRefresh:
